text: Unsettled. Cloudy. Showers, heavy at times. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 4 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms at first. Showers will ease off later. Force 4 to 5 southerly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Force 4 to 5 southerly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers. Force 4 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
